DMG dealt to boss increases +50%

When Terminal Winter defeats an enemy, reduces the cooldown of Terminal Winter by 2 turns

AP +50 upon entering

ATK DEF HP +10%
バーストスキル2段階解禁

【フィンブルウィンター】で敵を倒した時、
当該スキルのターンを2ターン減少

チェーンパッシブのWGダメージ+1

체인 패시브의 WG 감소량 +1
transcend.5_1_kr:

버스트 3단계 해금

transcend.5_1_zh:

SKT_FIRST.name: Cold-Blooded Torture
SKT_FIRST.name_jp: ルースレストーチャー

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to activate an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>. After activating an enhanced attack, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of <color=#28d9ed>all allies</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nWhen granted <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, doubles activation chance of activating an enhanced attack.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to activate an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>. After activating an enhanced attack, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of <color=#28d9ed>all allies</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nWhen granted <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, doubles activation chance of activating an enhanced attack.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to activate an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>. After activating an enhanced attack, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of <color=#28d9ed>all allies</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nWhen granted <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, doubles activation chance of activating an enhanced attack.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to activate an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>. After activating an enhanced attack, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of <color=#28d9ed>all allies</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nWhen granted <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, doubles activation chance of activating an enhanced attack.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> chance to activate an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>. After activating an enhanced attack, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of <color=#28d9ed>all allies</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nWhen granted <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, doubles activation chance of activating an enhanced attack.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>強化攻撃</color>が発生する。強化攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>味方全体</color>の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、強化攻撃の発生率が2倍になる。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>強化攻撃</color>が発生する。強化攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>味方全体</color>の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、強化攻撃の発生率が2倍になる。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>強化攻撃</color>が発生する。強化攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>味方全体</color>の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、強化攻撃の発生率が2倍になる。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>強化攻撃</color>が発生する。強化攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>味方全体</color>の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、強化攻撃の発生率が2倍になる。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>の確率で、<color=#28d9ed>強化攻撃</color>が発生する。強化攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>味方全体</color>の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、強化攻撃の発生率が2倍になる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다. 강화 공격 후에는 <color=#28d9ed>아군 전체</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 강화 공격의 발동 확률이 2배가 됩니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다. 강화 공격 후에는 <color=#28d9ed>아군 전체</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 강화 공격의 발동 확률이 2배가 됩니다.
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다. 강화 공격 후에는 <color=#28d9ed>아군 전체</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 강화 공격의 발동 확률이 2배가 됩니다.
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다. 강화 공격 후에는 <color=#28d9ed>아군 전체</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 강화 공격의 발동 확률이 2배가 됩니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>35%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다. 강화 공격 후에는 <color=#28d9ed>아군 전체</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 강화 공격의 발동 확률이 2배가 됩니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人。\n<color=#28d9ed>有15%</color>的几率触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。强化攻击后，<color=#28d9ed>全体友军</color>的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>时，强化攻击的触发几率为2倍。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击敌人。\n<color=#28d9ed>有15%</color>的几率触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。强化攻击后，<color=#28d9ed>全体友军</color>的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>时，强化攻击的触发几率为2倍。

true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击敌人。\n<color=#28d9ed>有25%</color>的几率触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。强化攻击后，<color=#28d9ed>全体友军</color>的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>时，强化攻击的触发几率为2倍。
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击敌人。\n<color=#28d9ed>有35%</color>的几率触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。强化攻击后，<color=#28d9ed>全体友军</color>的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>时，强化攻击的触发几率为2倍。

SKT_BURST_1.effect: Activates an enhanced attack\nIncreases Penetration by 30%
SKT_BURST_1.effect_jp: 強化攻撃が確定で発動\n貫通力30%UP
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 强化攻击必定触发\n穿透力提升30%

SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 追加ターン\n【フィンブルウィンター】スキルターン初期化
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 额外回合\n末日凛冬冷却时间重置

SKT_SECOND.name: Untouchable One
SKT_SECOND.name_jp: アンタッチャブル・ワン

true_desc_levels.1:
(Passive Effect) When hit, grants the caster a Barrier proportional to the caster's Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases the caster's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>. While holding <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, damage suffered in a single attack does not exceed <color=#28d9ed>95%</color> of the caster's Max Health. (Includes Dual Attacks and Additional Attacks / Excludes DoT)

(Triggered Effect) Activates an enhanced <color=#28d9ed>Cold-Blooded Torture</color> on the enemy with the highest Attack under the following conditions.
<color=#28d9ed>1. When an ally, including the caster, scores a critical hit, activates it as an Additional Attack.</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. When the caster takes a critical hit, counterattacks the attacker.</color>

(Passive Effect) When hit, grants the caster a Barrier proportional to the caster's Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases the caster's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>. While holding <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, damage suffered in a single attack does not exceed <color=#28d9ed>95%</color> of the caster's Max Health. (Includes Dual Attacks and Additional Attacks / Excludes DoT)

(Triggered Effect) Activates an enhanced <color=#28d9ed>Cold-Blooded Torture</color> on the enemy with the highest Attack under the following conditions.
<color=#28d9ed>1. When an ally, including the caster, scores a critical hit, activates it as an Additional Attack.</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. When the caster takes a critical hit, counterattacks the attacker.</color>

While holding <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, damage suffered in a single attack does not exceed <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> of the caster's Max Health. (Includes Dual Attacks and Additional Attacks / Excludes DoT)

(Triggered Effect) Activates an enhanced <color=#28d9ed>Cold-Blooded Torture</color> on the enemy with the highest Attack under the following conditions.

(Triggered Effect) Activates an enhanced <color=#28d9ed>Cold-Blooded Torture</color> on the enemy with the highest Attack under the following conditions.

While holding <color=#28d9ed>Hubris's Dominion</color>, damage suffered in a single attack does not exceed <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> of the caster's Max Health. (Includes Dual Attacks and Additional Attacks / Excludes DoT)

(Triggered Effect) Activates an enhanced <color=#28d9ed>Cold-Blooded Torture</color> on the enemy with the highest Attack under the following conditions.

true_desc_levels.1_jp:
(パッシブ効果) ダメージを受けた場合、自分にシールドを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>（自分の攻撃力比例）の間付与し、行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>増加させる。<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、一度に受けるダメージは自分の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>95%</color>を超えない。（連携・追加攻撃も含む / 継続ダメージを除く）

(発動効果) 条件に応じて強化された<color=#28d9ed>【ルースレストーチャー】</color>を最も攻撃力の高い敵に使用する。

<color=#28d9ed>1. 味方が会心攻撃時（自分含む）追加攻撃を使用</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. 自分が会心ダメージを受けた場合、対象に反撃</color>
true_desc_levels.2_jp:
(パッシブ効果) ダメージを受けた場合、自分にシールドを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>（自分の攻撃力比例）の間付与し、行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>増加させる。<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>がある場合、一度に受けるダメージは自分の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>95%</color>を超えない。（連携・追加攻撃も含む / 継続ダメージを除く）

(発動効果) 条件に応じて強化された<color=#28d9ed>【ルースレストーチャー】</color>を最も攻撃力の高い敵に使用する。

<color=#28d9ed>1. 味方が会心攻撃時（自分含む）追加攻撃を使用</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. 自分が会心ダメージを受けた場合、対象に反撃</color>

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
(패시브 효과) 피격 시 자신에게 실드를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>(자신 공격력 비례) 동안 부여하고 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다. <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 한번에 받는 피해는 자신 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>95%</color>를 초과하지 않습니다. (협공 및 추가타 포함 / 지속 피해 제외)

(발동 효과) 조건에 따라 강화된 <color=#28d9ed>냉혹한 고문</color>을 가장 공격력이 높은 적에게 사용합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>1. 아군이 치명 공격 시(자신 포함) 추가타 사용</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. 자신이 치명 공격 피격 시 대상에게 반격</color>
true_desc_levels.2_kr:
(패시브 효과) 피격 시 자신에게 실드를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>(자신 공격력 비례) 동안 부여하고 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다. <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color> 보유 시 한번에 받는 피해는 자신 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>95%</color>를 초과하지 않습니다. (협공 및 추가타 포함 / 지속 피해 제외)

(발동 효과) 조건에 따라 강화된 <color=#28d9ed>냉혹한 고문</color>을 가장 공격력이 높은 적에게 사용합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>1. 아군이 치명 공격 시(자신 포함) 추가타 사용</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. 자신이 치명 공격 피격 시 대상에게 반격</color>

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
(被动效果) 被攻击时，对自身附加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>的护盾（按自身攻击力计算），行动值增加<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。持有<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>时，一次受到的伤害不超过自身最大生命值的<color=#28d9ed>95%</color>。（包含夹攻及追加攻击 / 持续伤害除外）

(发动效果) 根据条件对攻击力最高的敌人使用强化版<color=#28d9ed>严刑拷打</color>。

<color=#28d9ed>1. 我方发动暴击时（含自身）使用追加攻击</color>
<color=#28d9ed>2. 自身被暴击时对目标进行反击</color>

SKT_ULTIMATE.name: Terminal Winter
SKT_ULTIMATE.name_jp: フィンブルウィンター

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, gains <color=#28d9ed>Hubris’s Dominion</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases the caster’s Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, gains <color=#28d9ed>Hubris’s Dominion</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases the caster’s Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, gains <color=#28d9ed>Hubris’s Dominion</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases the caster’s Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, gains <color=#28d9ed>Hubris’s Dominion</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn</color> and increases the caster’s Attack for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks all enemies. After attacking, gains <color=#28d9ed>Hubris’s Dominion</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> and increases the caster’s Attack for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. This attack <color=#28d9ed>ignores all Defense</color> of the enemy with the highest Max Health.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color><color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color><color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color><color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color><color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【傲慢の領域】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\nこの攻撃は最大HPが最も高い敵の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて無視</color>する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color>을 획득하고 자신의 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color>을 획득하고 자신의 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color>을 획득하고 자신의 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color>을 획득하고 자신의 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>오만의 영역</color>을 획득하고 자신의 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.\n이 공격은 최대 체력이 가장 높은 적의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>모두 무시</color> 합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后获得<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>，自身攻击力在<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内提升。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后获得<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>，自身攻击力在<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内提升。
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后获得<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>，自身攻击力在<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内提升。
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后获得<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>，自身攻击力在<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>内提升。
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后获得<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>傲慢领域</color>，自身攻击力在<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>内提升。\n此攻击<color=#28d9ed>完全无视</color>最大生命值最高的敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>。

5: Ignores the Defense of the enemy with the highest Max Health
5_jp: 最大HPが最も高い敵単体の防御力無視
5_kr: 가장 최대 체력이 높은 적의 방어력 무시
5_zh: 无视生命值上限最高敌人的防御力
